overall.description: First-person perspective footage from GTA V showing a walk along a highway roadside during dusk. The camera moves steadily forward past vehicles traveling in the opposite direction, with the illuminated Los Santos flower sign visible in the distance against the city skyline and a suspension bridge.

scene_state.functional_zone: highway roadside shoulder next to water canal

events.description: yellow sedan and dark SUV pass by on the highway in the opposite direction

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the highway shoulder next to the guardrail, approaching the illuminated sign in the distance

notable_agents.action: yellow sedan driving past in the opposite direction with headlights on

entered.detail: large illuminated pink flower-shaped sign glowing brightly against the dusk sky
tall bridge structure with cables visible behind the sign
metal guardrail separating the walkway from the multi-lane highway
tall chain-link fence running parallel to the road on the right side
Y-shaped electrical transmission towers with multiple cables
calm body of water running parallel to the highway on the left
distant city buildings silhouetted against the evening sky

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a first-person view walking along a highway shoulder during dusk. The iconic illuminated Los Santos flower sign glows in the center distance beyond a suspension bridge, while vehicles occasionally pass by on the wet asphalt highway to the left.

events.description: large dark truck and motorcycle pass by on the highway
dark pickup truck passes by on the highway

agents.ego_description: continuing along the roadside as the illuminated sign moves closer and shifts toward the left side of the frame

notable_agents.action: large dark truck followed by a motorcycle driving past in the opposite direction

segments.scene_description: The walk continues along the highway as vehicles including a large truck and motorcycle pass by. The Los Santos sign gradually moves from the center to the left side of the frame as the camera approaches, with the city skyline remaining visible in the distance.

events.description: dark truck passes by on the highway
los santos flower sign exits the left side of the frame

agents.ego_description: walking past the los santos sign as it moves out of view to the left, continuing toward the city skyline

notable_agents.action: dark pickup truck with taillights visible driving past on the wet highway

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the camera walking past the Los Santos sign as it moves to the far left and exits the frame. Vehicles continue to pass on the highway while the city skyline and suspension bridge remain visible ahead, with the roadside fence and power lines continuing along the right side.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person walk along a highway shoulder at dusk, moving from a distant view of the city skyline toward a close encounter with a landmark sign. It begins with the illuminated Los Santos flower sign glowing in the center distance beyond a suspension bridge, while vehicles glide past on the wet asphalt to the left. As the camera advances, the sign gradually shifts from the center toward the left side of the frame, passing by a large truck and a motorcycle. The scene then progresses until the camera walks directly past the sign, causing it to exit the frame to the far left. Finally, the movement continues forward along the roadside fence and power lines, keeping the city skyline and suspension bridge visible ahead.
